scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for install_smartcard_packages (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_install_smartcard_packages). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
#!/bin/bash
if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then
    if ! { grep -sqE "^.*\.s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/osrelease || grep -sqE "^s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/arch; }; then
        if ! rpm --quiet -q openssl-pkcs11; then
            dnf install -y openssl-pkcs11
        else
            echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' >&2
        fi
    fi
fi
